message:
🐛 Fix null contributions crash on page load (#1236)

Initialize contributions slice with make() instead of nil declaration
so JSON marshals to [] instead of null. Also add optional chaining
guard on the frontend .length check for defense in depth.

Fixes: Uncaught TypeError: Cannot read properties of null (reading 'length')

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -930,7 +930,7 @@ export function FeatureRequestModal({ isOpen, onClose, initialTab, initialContex

Log in with GitHub to see contributions

- ) : githubRewards.contributions.length === 0 ? ( + ) : !githubRewards.contributions?.length ? (

No contributions found — open issues or PRs to earn points
